Entry.JapaneseText: ああ！ 世界樹に緑が！
Entry.EnglishText: Ahh! The World Tree is green!

Entry.JapaneseText: 戻ったんだ！ シュヴァルツが消えたから！
これでマナの枯渇も解消される。 村も元気になるんだね！
Entry.EnglishText: This will solve the issue with the Mana drying up. The village will liven up, too!

Entry.JapaneseText: うん！ だけど、大事なのはこれからだ
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah! But the important stuff starts now.

Entry.JapaneseText: 二度とシュヴァルツが生まれないように オレ達は少しずつ変わっていかなきゃ
Entry.EnglishText: We all gotta change, bit by bit, to make sure Schwartz is never reborn.

Entry.JapaneseText: そうだね。 これからが本当の戦いかもね
Entry.EnglishText: You're right. Everything from this point on might be our real battle.

Entry.JapaneseText: でも、オレ達は負けないよ。 オレにコハクがいるように みんなにも大切な誰かがいるから！
Entry.EnglishText: But we won't lose. Just like I have you, everyone has someone who's dear to them.

Entry.JapaneseText: だから人間は どこまでだって強くなれるんだ！
Entry.EnglishText: That's why humans can get stronger and stronger!

Entry.JapaneseText: オレ達、これから先もずーっと ガンドコ行こう！
Entry.EnglishText: We just gotta keeeep being awesome like we always have!
Entry.Notes: Uses Shing's ガンドコ, which is specific to him and has no actual meaning. The "official" Hearts R translation is an entire sentences for a single word and I think there's a pretty common "this loc sucks for legitimate reasons" sentiment among JP speakers for Hearts R, so I'd rather not use that. I may change this later, but for now, I'm using this so I can avoid debating too long on it.

Entry.JapaneseText: うん！ ガンドコだね！
